title: Q3 Security Audit Follow-up
description: Follow-up on Q3 security audit findings. Assign owner, track remediation items, and schedule review meeting.

title: Q3 Security Audit - Documentation
description: Complete and finalize documentation for the Q3 security audit. Include findings, actions taken, and compliance notes.

title: Q3 Security Audit - Planning
description: Plan and scope the Q3 security audit. Identify systems in scope, audit timeline, and required resources.

title: Server Maintenance - Patch Updates
description: Apply latest OS patches to production and staging servers. Coordinate with DevOps for maintenance window.

title: Data Backup Verification
description: Verify integrity of weekly database backups. Restore sample data to confirm recoverability.

title: Production Release v2.5
description: Roll out release v2.5 to production environment. Includes feature flags and rollback plan.
